 I want to make a new feature to  be able to store the battle report that combined on the Battle Mode that we already have
 This would be active when we matchup with a opponent and both have build model, then we can write down each activation on each model on turn by turn like

Activation 1 -  Army Thousand Son - Model Sekhetar Robot

- Action 1: Dash and see model A from opponent's army on distance 11"
- Action 2: Perform Ranged Attack by weapon Autogun on target model A (24", AUTOMATIC 2, -1 INJURY DICE, ASSAULT)

  - Shoot 1: SUCCEEDED - Injury Damage Roll: 7 - Injury Modifier: -2 (Model A armour) -> + 1 BLOOD MARKER on model A
  - Shoot 2: FAILED
- Action 3: Perform Ranged Attack by weapon Storm Bolter on target model A (24", AUTOMATIC 2, VICIOUS 11, ASSAULT, CRITICAL)

  - Shoot 1: CRITICAL SUCCEEDED - Injury Damage Roll: 9 - Injury Modifier: -2 (Model A armour) -> + 1 BLOOD MARKER & DOWN on model A
  - Shoot 2: SUCCEEDED - Injury Damage Roll: 5 - Injury Modifier: -2 (Model A armour) -> + 1 BLOOD MARKER on model A
- Action 4: Perform Charge action - SUCCEEDED - Go into melee combat with model A
- Action 5: Perform Melee Attack by weapon Power Claw (+ 1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY, ARMOUR PIERCING 2)

  - SUCCEEDED - Injury Damage Roll: 10 - Injury Modifier: 0 (Model A armour + ARMOUR PIERCING 2) -> Model A is taken out of action
